title: DCG Stack Manifest — dcg-stack.yml
description: Composition manifest that layers multiple DCG domain projects into a unified queryable stack. Typically stored as YAML; this schema validates the parsed structure.

layers.description: Ordered list of composition layers. Declaration order determines query priority (first-declared wins).

layer_entry.description: A composition layer pointing to a DCG domain project.

name.description: Unique layer identifier within this stack.

source.description: Path to the DCG domain project directory (resolved relative to the manifest file).

extends.description: Name of another layer in this stack for cross-layer entity resolution. Must reference an existing layer. The extends graph must be acyclic.

pass_type.description: Default pass type hint for this layer.
